sum: New Athkatlan district available from the start of BG2, featuring a main quest, mini-quests, shops, a tavern, and a temple.

co.n: Yes, but don't patch the existing save games
co.tp2n: Yes, but don't patch the existing save games
co.scn: Southern Edge: the new district of Athkatla
co.no: New game required. Recommended for fresh EET installs

co.n: Yes and patch existing save games
co.tp2n: Yes, and patch the existing save games
co.scn: Southern Edge: the new district of Athkatla
co.no: Patches existing saves. Use if mid-playthrough
